description:
Goal
Make runtime value demand a first-class compiler2 data model, separate from semantic callable evidence and from backend representation.

Problem being fixed
ActivationAnalysis.runtime_callable_values and ClosureBoundaryUse::CallableArg collapse two different facts: exact callable use and first-class runtime callable materialization. After that collapse, later phases recover callable obligations from types, which is too broad.

Code seams
- src/compiler2/semantic.rs: ActivationAnalysis currently stores runtime_callable_values; SemanticClosure is the stored value for the SemanticClosed FactKey.
- src/compiler2/jobs/semantic.rs: ClosureBoundaryUse, runtime_callable_boundary_values, note_callable_arg_uses, closure_value_needs_runtime_boundary, resolve_materialized_runtime_callable_boundary_activations.
- Existing exact callable evidence remains in CallSiteSummary.targets[*].surface_inputs, not directly on CallSiteSummary.

Data model to add
RuntimeDemand = Ignore | Value | TupleFields(Vec<RuntimeDemand>) | Callable(CallableDemand).
CallableDemand = { resolved: BTreeSet<CallableSurface>, opaque: bool, escape: bool }.
CallableSurface = normalized/canonical surface_inputs Vec<Ty>.
ExecutableRuntimeDemand = { return_demand, input_demands, value_demands, call_arg_demands, callable_materializations }.
CallableMaterialization = DirectOnly { surfaces } | FirstClass { surfaces }.

Normalization rules
Ignore is bottom. Value means whole runtime value is required. TupleFields joins fieldwise and collapses to Value when a whole-value consumer appears. CallableDemand joins by unioning resolved surfaces and OR-ing opaque/escape. When type information proves a whole-value demand applies to a callable, preserve callable-specific information by representing that as CallableDemand with escape=true rather than losing resolved surfaces.

What must not happen in this ticket
Do not make backend/native behavior more clever locally. This ticket only introduces the model and local normalization tests so later phases can consume one shared plan.

Removal target
This ticket should either remove ActivationAnalysis.runtime_callable_values outright or mark it as a short-lived compile error to be removed by the next ticket. Do not add compatibility shims that keep the old meaning alive.

Checks
Add focused unit tests for demand joins and normalization, especially:
- Ignore + resolved callable demand preserves only the resolved surface.
- resolved callable + escape preserves the resolved surface and marks first-class demand.
- tuple field demand + whole-value demand collapses to Value.
- whole-value demand on callable type does not erase known resolved surfaces.
title: Compiler2 runtime demand: model semantic use separately from representation demand
